summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that DUK is currently testing its Daily 200MA support zone near $122.96. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 27.3%. The asset has recently tested this support 2 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $129.36 and a significant trendline confluence around $127.71 (formed by 9 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
